general.name: mos_target_gaia_dr3_source
general.description: The main Gaia Data Release 3 source table. This table has an entry for every Gaia observed source as published with this data release. It contains the basic source parameters, in their final state as processed by the Gaia Data Processing and Analysis Consortium from the raw data coming from the spacecraft. For more details, refer to https://gea.esac.esa.int/archive/documentation/GDR3/Gaia_archive/chap_datamodel/sec_dm_main_source_catalogue/ssec_dm_gaia_source.html.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_gaia_dr3_source-[NUM].[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits', V_TARG='2.0.0', and NUM=1..34 for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

designation.name: designation
designation.description: Unique source designation (unique across all Data Releases)

random_index.description: Random index for use when selecting subsets
